content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "選擇餐廳",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我們今天想吃晚餐，你有推薦的餐廳嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒmen jīntiān xiǎng chī wǎncān, nǐ yǒu tuījiàn de cāntīng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3men jin1tian1 xiang3 chi1 wan3can1, ni3 you3 tui1jian4 de can1ting1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, we want to have dinner today. Do you have any restaurant recommendations?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 오늘 저녁을 먹고 싶은데 추천하는 식당이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有啊，附近有一家牛肉麵店，很好吃，價錢也不貴。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, fùjìn yǒu yī jiā niúròumiàn diàn, hěn hǎochī, jiàqián yě bù guì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 a, fu4jin4 you3 yi1 jia1 niu2rou4mian4 dian4, hen3 hao3chi1, jia4qian2 ye3 bu4 gui4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, there's a beef noodle shop nearby. It's delicious and the price is not expensive.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 근처에 소고기 국수 가게가 있는데 맛있고 가격도 비싸지 않아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "牛肉麵不錯，可是我想吃滷肉飯，有沒有賣滷肉飯的餐廳？",
          "pinyin": "Niúròumiàn bùcuò, kěshì wǒ xiǎng chī lǔròufàn, yǒu méiyǒu mài lǔròufàn de cāntīng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Niu2rou4mian4 bu4cuo4, ke3shi4 wo3 xiang3 chi1 lu3rou4fan4, you3 mei2you3 mai4 lu3rou4fan4 de can1ting1?",
          "translation_en": "Beef noodles are good, but I want to eat braised pork rice. Is there a restaurant that sells braised pork rice?",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수도 좋지만 저는 루로우판을 먹고 싶어요. 루로우판을 파는 식당이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有，前面路口左轉有一家小吃店，他們的滷肉飯是招牌，很多人推薦。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, qiánmiàn lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn yǒu yī jiā xiǎochī diàn, tāmen de lǔròufàn shì zhāopái, hěnduō rén tuījiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, qian2mian4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3 you3 yi1 jia1 xiao3chi1 dian4, ta1men de lu3rou4fan4 shi4 zhao1pai2, hen3duo1 ren2 tui1jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, turn left at the intersection ahead and there's a small eatery. Their braised pork rice is their signature dish, and many people recommend it.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 앞쪽 사거리에서 좌회전하면 작은 음식점이 있는데 거기의 루로우판이 시그니처 메뉴이고 많은 사람들이 추천해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "太好了，那我們就去那家小吃店吧。謝謝你的建議！",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, nà wǒmen jiù qù nà jiā xiǎochī diàn ba. Xièxiè nǐ de jiànyì!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le, na4 wo3men jiu4 qu4 na4 jia1 xiao3chi1 dian4 ba. Xie4xie4 ni3 de jian4yi4!",
          "translation_en": "Great, then let's go to that small eatery. Thank you for your suggestion!",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 그 음식점으로 갑시다. 추천 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does A want to eat?",
          "question_ko": "A는 무엇을 먹고 싶어합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodles", "Braised pork rice", "Fried rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "루로우판", "볶음밥"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about your favorite restaurant and what you like to order there."
    },
    {
      "title": "選擇時間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們明天下午碰面，你覺得幾點比較方便？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen míngtiān xiàwǔ pèngmiàn, nǐ juéde jǐ diǎn bǐjiào fāngbiàn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3men ming2tian1 xia4wu3 peng4mian4, ni3 jue2de ji3 dian3 bi3jiao4 fang1bian4?",
          "translation_en": "We're meeting tomorrow afternoon. What time do you think is more convenient?",
          "translation_ko": "내일 오후에 만나는데 몇 시가 더 편하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我下午兩點到四點有空，三點怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn dào sì diǎn yǒu kòng, sān diǎn zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3 dao4 si4 dian3 you3 kong4, san1 dian3 zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "I'm free from 2 to 4 PM. How about 3 o'clock?",
          "translation_ko": "저는 오후 2시부터 4시까지 시간이 있는데 3시는 어떠세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "三點可以，不過我想提早到兩點半，因為我晚上還有事。",
          "pinyin": "Sān diǎn kěyǐ, bùguò wǒ xiǎng tízǎo dào liǎng diǎn bàn, yīnwèi wǒ wǎnshàng hái yǒu shì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "San1 dian3 ke3yi3, bu4guo4 wo3 xiang3 ti2zao3 dao4 liang3 dian3 ban4, yin1wei4 wo3 wan3shang4 hai2 you3 shi4.",
          "translation_en": "3 o'clock is fine, but I'd like to move it earlier to 2:30 because I have something to do in the evening.",
          "translation_ko": "3시도 괜찮은데, 제가 저녁에 일이 있어서 2시 30분으로 일찍 당기고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，那就兩點半在咖啡店碰面，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, nà jiù liǎng diǎn bàn zài kāfēi diàn pèngmiàn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, na4 jiu4 liang3 dian3 ban4 zai4 ka1fei1 dian4 peng4mian4, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, then let's meet at the coffee shop at 2:30, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 그럼 2시 30분에 커피숍에서 만나요, 괜찮죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，兩點半見，謝謝你改時間。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, liǎng diǎn bàn jiàn, xièxiè nǐ gǎi shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, liang3 dian3 ban4 jian4, xie4xie4 ni3 gai3 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, see you at 2:30. Thank you for changing the time.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 2시 30분에 뵙겠습니다. 시간을 변경해 주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What time do they finally agree to meet?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 최종적으로 몇 시에 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["2:00", "2:30", "3:00"],
          "options_ko": ["2시", "2시 30분", "3시"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a time you had to change a meeting time. What happened?"
    },
    {
      "title": "選擇路線",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，請問到台北車站要怎麼走？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn dào Táiběi chēzhàn yào zěnme zǒu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si, qing3wen4 dao4 Tai2bei3 che1zhan4 yao4 zen3me zou3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get to Taipei Main Station?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 타이베이 역까지 어떻게 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你可以搭捷運，也可以搭公車。你比較想選哪一種？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kěyǐ dā jiéyùn, yě kěyǐ dā gōngchē. Nǐ bǐjiào xiǎng xuǎn nǎ yī zhǒng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ke3yi3 da1 jie2yun4, ye3 ke3yi3 da1 gong1che1. Ni3 bi3jiao4 xiang3 xuan3 na3 yi1 zhong3?",
          "translation_en": "You can take the MRT or the bus. Which one would you prefer?",
          "translation_ko": "지하철을 타도 되고 버스를 타도 됩니다. 어떤 것을 더 선호하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我趕時間，哪一條路線比較快？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ gǎn shíjiān, nǎ yī tiáo lùxiàn bǐjiào kuài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 gan3 shi2jian1, na3 yi1 tiao2 lu4xian4 bi3jiao4 kuai4?",
          "translation_en": "I'm in a hurry. Which route is faster?",
          "translation_ko": "시간이 촉박한데 어떤 경로가 더 빠른가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "捷運比較快，大概十五分鐘就到了。公車可能要三十分鐘。",
          "pinyin": "Jiéyùn bǐjiào kuài, dàgài shíwǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào le. Gōngchē kěnéng yào sānshí fēnzhōng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jie2yun4 bi3jiao4 kuai4, da4gai4 shi2wu3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le. Gong1che1 ke3neng2 yao4 san1shi2 fen1zhong1.",
          "translation_en": "The MRT is faster, about 15 minutes. The bus might take 30 minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "지하철이 더 빠릅니다. 약 15분이면 도착해요. 버스는 30분 정도 걸릴 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，那我搭捷運。請問捷運站入口在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà wǒ dā jiéyùn. Qǐngwèn jiéyùn zhàn rùkǒu zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, na4 wo3 da1 jie2yun4. Qing3wen4 jie2yun4 zhan4 ru4kou3 zai4 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll take the MRT. Where is the MRT station entrance?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 지하철을 타겠습니다. 지하철역 입구가 어디에 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "前面路口右轉，走兩分鐘就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Qiánmiàn lùkǒu yòu zhuǎn, zǒu liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qian2mian4 lu4kou3 you4 zhuan3, zou3 liang3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.",
          "translation_en": "Turn right at the intersection ahead, and it's a two-minute walk.",
          "translation_ko": "앞쪽 사거리에서 우회전하면 2분 거리입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝你，幫我選了最快的路線！",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè nǐ, bāng wǒ xuǎn le zuì kuài de lùxiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4 ni3, bang1 wo3 xuan3 le zui4 kuai4 de lu4xian4!",
          "translation_en": "Thank you for helping me choose the fastest route!",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 가장 빠른 경로를 선택하는 데 도움을 주셨어요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which route does A choose?",
          "question_ko": "A는 어떤 경로를 선택했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Bus", "MRT", "Walking"],
          "options_ko": ["버스", "지하철", "도보"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about a time you asked for directions. What did you say?"
    }
  ]
}
